name: pr-review-watch
description: Watch an explicitly selected GitHub pull request until configured review agents and checks pass, using project-local...

interface.shortDescription: Watch an explicitly selected GitHub pull request until configured review agents and checks pass, using project-local...
interface.longDescription: Watch an explicitly selected GitHub pull request until configured review agents and checks pass, using project-local review memory, bounded heartbeat polling, fix loops, and terminal Telegram notifications.
